ranged_weapons.name: Combat Rifle
ranged_weapons.special: Suppressing Fire: on hit, target cannot take Scout action next activation

ranged_weapons.name: Heavy Sidearm
ranged_weapons.special: Bonus action after moving

melee_weapon.name: Tactical Blade
melee_weapon.special: Natural 18–20 on attack die: deal +1d6 bonus damage

special_ability.name: Rally the Line
special_ability.text: Once per game: all friendlies within 8" each recover 1 HP.

ranged_weapons.name: Marksman Rifle
ranged_weapons.special: Ignore cover AC beyond 12"
Point Blank: within 6", +1d4 damage

special_ability.name: Overwatch Eye
special_ability.text: Once per game: place an Overwatch token. By using CP, enemy operant within 24" LoS triggers a free Marksman Rifle attack from that spot, even if not spotted.

ranged_weapons.name: Grenade Launcher
ranged_weapons.special: Blast 3" — AC 14 save or hit
Incendiary: 1d4 fire dmg at start of target's next turn

special_ability.name: Frag Pack
special_ability.text: Once per game: plant a charge on terrain. Triggers on entry within 2" (3d6, Blast 4") or detonate on Ironkeg's activation.

ranged_weapons.name: Assault Carbine
ranged_weapons.special: Stabilising: on hit, one friendly within 4" recovers 1 HP

ranged_weapons.name: Medshot Injector
ranged_weapons.special: Heals friendly target instead of damage

melee_weapon.name: Shock Baton
melee_weapon.special: Target operant: DC 15 save or take damage

special_ability.name: Trauma Response
special_ability.text: Once per game: when a friendly within 6" is downed, Stitch moves up to 4" and restores them to 2 HP.

ranged_weapons.name: Submachine Gun
ranged_weapons.special: Burst: –2 to hit, roll dmg twice (take higher)

special_ability.name: Charge!
special_ability.text: Once per game: move ≥4" straight toward target before melee: +1d6 damage and push target back 2".

ranged_weapons.name: Mag-Rail Carbine
ranged_weapons.special: Ignores 1 pt heavy armour AC bonus

ranged_weapons.name: Scatter Pistol
ranged_weapons.special: Hits all in 2" cone from target

melee_weapon.name: Vibro-Blade
melee_weapon.special: Reroll one damage die per attack (take higher)

special_ability.name: Calculated Strike
special_ability.text: Once per game: designate a Priority Target. All friendlies gain +2 to attack that target until it is downed.

ranged_weapons.name: Silenced Long Rifle
ranged_weapons.special: Firing does not reveal Whisper's position

ranged_weapons.name: Dart Pistol
ranged_weapons.special: Poison: 1d4 damage at start of target's next turn

special_ability.name: Ghost Protocol
special_ability.text: Once per round: spend 2 CP to become Concealed — enemies cannot target Whisper until Whisper moves or attacks.

ranged_weapons.name: Rotary Cannon
ranged_weapons.special: Stationary: +1 to hit; on hit, target loses their next Move action

ranged_weapons.name: Flamer
ranged_weapons.special: Burning: 1d4 fire dmg at start of target's next turn

special_ability.name: Iron Bastion
special_ability.text: While stationary: friendlies within 3" may use Vault's AC against ranged attacks — Vault absorbs the hit.

ranged_weapons.name: Shock Rifle
ranged_weapons.special: EMP Burst: on hit, target loses their next Move action

ranged_weapons.name: Attack Drone
ranged_weapons.special: Can be countered by target, drone: HP 4, Ballistic DC 11

melee_weapon.name: Shock Baton
melee_weapon.special: Target operant: DC 15 save or take damage

special_ability.name: System Override
special_ability.text: Once per game: skip movement this activation — one enemy within 18" LoS loses their Special Ability for the rest of the game.

ranged_weapons.name: Hunting Rifle
ranged_weapons.special: Marked: +2 to hit that target for rest of game (does not stack with Calculated Strike)

ranged_weapons.name: Revolver
ranged_weapons.special: Fan the Hammer: fire twice at –2 to hit each

special_ability.name: No Hiding
special_ability.text: Once per game: the Marked target's Spotted token is permanent — moving no longer removes it. They remain targetable for the rest of the game.
